docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,286.49 FILED BY BROWN, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT TAT, HAROLD (HAROLD TAT DBA CENTRAL COMPUTER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED DEC-19-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAT, HAROLD (HAROLD TAT DBA CENTRAL COMPUTER)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK M. SCHWARTZ-SCOTT; NOT REPORTED (506) EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR BOTH SIDES. ALL PARTIES PRESENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAT, HAROLD (HAROLD TAT DBA CENTRAL COMPUTER) $2,133.67 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,203.67, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES RESCISSION OF PLAINTIFF'S PURCHASE OF THE SUBJECT COMPUTER. THEREFORE, WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT IS FINAL, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN THE COMPUTER TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
